articles.title: Death toll rises to 10 after Israeli strike on south Lebanon town
articles.summary: Death toll rises to 10 after Israeli strike on south Lebanon town The death toll from the Israeli air strike on the town of Deir Qanoun en-Nahr in Lebanon’s Tyre district has risen to 10, according to Lebanon’s National News Agency. The dead include three women and three children, the agency reported. Three other people, including a girl, were wounded in the attack.

articles.title: Building Fan Community Key to WNBA Success, Says Valkyries President Jess Smith

articles.title: Hezbollah says it launched fresh attacks on Israeli forces in south Lebanon
articles.summary: Hezbollah says it launched fresh attacks on Israeli forces in south Lebanon Hezbollah said it carried out a new series of attacks targeting Israeli forces over the past few hours in southern Lebanon. The group said its fighters struck Israeli troops in Khallat Raj, near the town of Deir Siryan, using “artillery shells, rocket salvos, and attack drones”. articles.summary: Rubio discusses Strait of Hormuz with UN chief US Secretary of State Marco Rubio held talks with United Nations secretary general Antonio Guterres on the situation in the Strait of Hormuz, according to the US State Department. articles.summary: EU pledges support for farmers hit by fertiliser price surge The European Union has promised “exceptional support” for farmers affected by rising fertiliser costs linked to the US-Israeli war on Iran.
